summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Enhanced Event Registration with new participant categories (iteration 15). All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: 6 registration categories visible, accompanying person sub-forms, corporate/industry max 2 persons, admin 8 fee categories, and add-ons section. Full registration flow tested successfully.

issues: Some categories show ₹0 or $0 because the existing event doesn't have fees configured for student, accompanying, corporate_industry, international categories in fee_tiers. This is expected - admin needs to configure fees for these categories.

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well structured. REG_CATEGORIES and FEE_CATEGORIES are properly defined with all 8 categories.
Backend EventRegistration model correctly includes registration_category, accompanying_persons, corporate_persons, selected_addons, addon_fee fields.
Export endpoint includes all new columns (Reg Category, Accompanying Persons, Corporate Persons, Add-ons, Addon Fee).
seed_data_creation: Test registrations created with various categories: non_member, student, international, accompanying (with persons), corporate_industry (with 2 persons), addon selections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced event registration tested. Features verified: 6 public registration categories (IDSEA Member, Non-Member, Student/JRF/SRF/RA/Retired, Accompanying Person, Corporate/Industry, International), Admin 8 fee categories in fee tiers, Optional Add-ons section with Add/Remove functionality, Accompanying persons sub-forms (name+relation), Corporate/Industry max 2 persons (name+designation), Phone lookup for IDSEA members, Fee breakdown includes addon_fee. Existing event 'International Dairy Conference 2026' has fee_tiers with 4 categories - to test full 8 categories, admin needs to edit and add fees for student, accompanying, corporate_industry, international.

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/events/{id}/registrations: PASS - Returns new fields (registration_category, accompanying_persons, corporate_persons, selected_addons, addon_fee)
PASS - Returns Excel with new columns
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/events (8 fee categories: PASS - Accepts all 8 fee categories in fee_tiers

frontend_elements.Step 0 - Fee Overview: PASS - Shows registration fees table with categories
frontend_elements.Step 0 - Accommodation fees table: PASS - Shows default accommodation fees with FREE badge for free categories
frontend_elements.Step 0 - Premium Hotels section: PASS - Shows hotel options with fees
frontend_elements.Step 0 - IDSEA Membership section: PASS - Shows membership types and fees for non-members
frontend_elements.Step 1 - 6 Category cards: PASS - IDSEA Member, Non-Member, Student/JRF/SRF/RA/Retired, Accompanying Person, Corporate/Industry Personnel, International Delegates
frontend_elements.Step 1 - IDSEA Member phone lookup: PASS - Shows phone input and Find button when IDSEA Member selected
frontend_elements.Step 1 - Accompanying Person sub-form: PASS - Shows name + relation dropdown, + Add Person button
frontend_elements.Step 1 - Corporate/Industry max 2: PASS - Shows name + designation, + Add Person button hidden after 2
frontend_elements.Step 2 - Membership registration option: PASS - 'I also want to become an IDSEA Member' checkbox visible
frontend_elements.Step 2 - Add-ons checkboxes: INFO - Would show if event has registration_addons configured
frontend_elements.Step 3 - Accommodation options: PASS - Default, Premium hotels, Self options
frontend_elements.Step 4 - Fee Breakdown: PASS - Shows Registration Fee, Accommodation Fee, Total Amount
frontend_elements.Admin Events - 8 fee categories: PASS - Academic, Entrepreneur, Corporate, Non-Member, Student/JRF/SRF/RA/Retired, Accompanying Person, Corporate/Industry, International (USD)
frontend_elements.Admin Events - Add-on section: PASS - 'Optional Add-ons' title, '+ Add Add-on' button, addon row with Name/Fee/Currency/Description
